title: Mortar and Pestle Set,Heavy Duty,Unpolished Granite,6 Inch-2Cup Capacity,Grinder for Spices and Seeds,Grinding,Crushing and Mashing Spices,Nuts,for Guacamole,Garlic Sauce,Gray.
description:
About this item
Kitchen cooking necessities:mortar and pestle set use the ancient grinding method to make the food closer to nature. The manual friction between natural stone and food, such as molcajete, can stimulate the natural flavor and original aroma of food and obtain the best kitchen experience and cooking taste.
Multiple functions:suitable for all kinds of food in the kitchen,such as grinding nuts,seeds,ginger roots and garlic into powder,homemade salad dressing,various sauces and condiments,such as fresh mustard,salsa,quacamole,pesto,chutneys and more,It can be widely used to grind pills into powder to help people or pets take drugs quickly.
Rugged and durable:the unpolished granite is well made,retains the strong and durable characteristics of stone,and can resist scratches and stains.It will be the eternal decoration of your kitchen.Considering that the pestle is used for a long time and accidentally dropped,a spare pestle is added and an anti-skid and scratch pad is given to avoid the base wearing the kitchen table.
Easy to use and clean: the self weight of 8bls makes it easy to grind food manually. The unpolished inner wall and sufficient friction easily make the food look like what it needs. Cleaning this mortar and pestle set is easy.Just wash it with sponge and warm water.
Perfect gift: This mortar and pestle is the perfect gift for people who like cooking. It is very suitable as a holiday, housewarming or birthday gift. We hope you are absolutely satisfied with the mortar and pestle set,if it is damaged during transportation,contact us after receiving the product,and replace it at the first time or choose worry free refund. Buy the best unpolished granite mortar and pestle set now!
reviews_5s:
Excellent quality, very heavy granite. I like the feel of it. This will be superb in the kitchen! Cleans up easy and looks great on the counter!Having had a much smaller mortar and pestle, I finally broke down and upgraded to this much larger unit. Sure wish I had done this years ago. The rubber pad that attaches to bottom, along with weight gives this very good stability, even when you're putting some effort and energy into what you're grinding, it stays in place.
The small etchings/grooves in the bottom of the bowl is a great addition and enhances its ability in grinding, very nice touch! The extra pestle is just in case you drop and break one. Cleanup is easy, water and sponge...and done.
After struggling with a much smaller and lesser quantity mortar/pestle unit I can whole heartily recommend this 2 cup unit! The cup is nice and deep so that helps to keep stuff inside. So go ahead and up grade yourself. I would buy this again for myself or as a gift to a close friend.This mortar and pestle set is beautifully designed and nicely made. The color is beautiful and the longer pestle make it a lot easier than some of the others. Ease of cleaning is great, the grip and texture is good as well and I do believe that it won’t chip or break unless you are trying to break it. It’s really an overall lovely set and works and does what it needs toVery pleased with this 2 cup granite mortar and pestle - heaviness of the granite and the rough surface makes it easy to pulp ginger, garlic and pulverize nuts and seeds. Comes with 2 pestles and a non-slip base that the customer sticks on.I cook a lot and a large portion of the recipes I use call for some very fine ingredients. When using my mill, I am able to crush peppers and spices to a very fine consistency without any problems! Great Product!!!!Exceeded my expectations. Solid, Heavy duty, great quality for the price. Exactly what I wantedSold and perfect size as I look for.This is perfect molcajete for small amount.of spices!!
Perfect weight!!Finally I got a real granite/stone/rock mortar and pestle. I believe each kitchen should have them lol.Durable just love it, it's heavy though.
